name: Gross margin percent
notes: Product-design assertion for the VAKA ERP; not an external factual claim.
definition: Profitability of goods sold before overheads.
formula: (Net sales - cost of goods sold) / net sales x 100

name: Stock turnover days
notes: Product-design assertion for the VAKA ERP; not an external factual claim.
definition: Average days stock is held before sale.
formula: (Average inventory value / cost of goods sold) x days in period
erpDataSource: Inventory valuation layers and sales history.

name: Shrinkage rate
notes: Product-design assertion for the VAKA ERP; not an external factual claim.
definition: Stock loss from theft, damage, expiry and error.
formula: (Book stock value - counted stock value) / net sales x 100

name: Average basket value
notes: Product-design assertion for the VAKA ERP; not an external factual claim.
formula: Net sales / number of sales transactions

name: Daily sales by currency
notes: Product-design assertion for the VAKA ERP; not an external factual claim.
definition: Sales split across trading currencies (e.g. USD and ZWG).
formula: Sum of sales per currency per day
erpDataSource: Multi-currency invoicing with snapshotted exchange rates.

name: Stockout rate
notes: Product-design assertion for the VAKA ERP; not an external factual claim.
definition: Share of tracked products at zero available stock.
formula: Products at zero available stock / tracked products x 100
erpDataSource: Low-stock alert state and inventory levels.

name: Debtor days (credit sales)
notes: Product-design assertion for the VAKA ERP; not an external factual claim.
definition: Average days credit customers take to pay.
formula: (Accounts receivable / credit sales) x days in period

name: VAT liability accrued
notes: Product-design assertion for the VAKA ERP; not an external factual claim.
definition: Output VAT less input VAT accrued for the open tax period.
formula: Output VAT - input VAT for the period
erpDataSource: VAT treatment model and tax codes.
